39.reason: [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so child nodes do not get incremented depth. Should use pre-increment (++depth) or depth+1.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so child nodes do not get incremented depth. Should use pre-increment (++depth) or depth+1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so the child node receives the same depth as the parent. Should use pre-increment (++depth) or pass depth+1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so child nodes do not get depth+1. Should use pre-increment or depth+1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, not depth+1. This causes incorrect height calculation. Should use depth+1 instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so child nodes do not get depth+1. Should use pre-increment (++depth) or pass depth+1 directly.]

43.reason: [Same issue: post-increment does not increase depth for the right subtree traversal.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: post-increment does not increase depth for the right subtree traversal.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: post-increment does not increase depth before passing it to the recursive call. This leads to incorrect height calculation for leaf nodes.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: post-increment does not pass incremented depth to the recursive call. Should use depth+1.]
